source_section.title_label_raw: Building Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width

sections.title_label_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is 64.0 metres or less in width and is either:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: a streetwall; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: an exterior wall that abuts a front or flanking yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: This Section shall not apply to:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: any new main building or additions to any existing main building in an INS, UC -2, or UC -1 zone that are set back a minimum of 40.0 metres from a streetline; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: a cultural use located within the DH zone. (RCCC -Dec 09/24;E-Dec 24/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: Streetwalls or exterior walls that abut a front or flanking yard, and that have a width no greater than 64.0 metres, shall be divided into distinct sections between 0.3 metre and 10.0 metres in width, extending from the ground to the top of the streetwall. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: Each distinct section required under Subsection 359(3) shall be differentiated from abutting distinct sections by using a minimum of two of the following methods (Diagram 12):

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: different colours;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: different materials;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: different textures;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: living walls;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: projections; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: recesses.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Design Requirements Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are 64.0 Metres or Less in Width
provisions.text: Projections or recesses used under Subsection 359(4) shall be no less than 0.15 metre deep. Diagram 12: Methods for articulation for streetwalls or exterior walls that abut a front or flanking yard, per Sections 359 or 360 Design Requirement: Articulation for Streetwalls or Exterior Walls that Abut a Front or Flanking Yard and that are Greater than 64.0 Metres in Width

sections.title_label_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0 metres in width and is either:

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: a streetwall; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: an exterior wall that abuts a front or flanking yard.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: This Section shall not apply to any new main building or additions to any existing main building in an INS, UC-2, or UC-1 zone that are set back a minimum of 40.0 metres from a streetline.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: Streetwalls or exterior walls that abut a front or flanking yard, and that have a width greater than 64.0 metres, shall be divided into distinct sections between 0.3 metre and 10.0 metres in width, extending from the ground to the top of the streetwall. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: Each distinct section required under Subsection 360(3) shall be differentiated from abutting distinct sections by (Diagram 12):

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: providing projections or recesses that are no less than 0.6 metre deep; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: using a minimum of two of the following methods:

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: different colours,

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: different materials,

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: different textures, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: living walls.

provisions.heading_context_raw: This Section applies to an exterior wall that is greater than 64.0
provisions.text: Streetwalls or exterior walls that abut a front or flanking yard under this Section shall incorporate a minimum of one recess in the wall, that extends vertically from the ground to the top of the wall, which has a minimum required dimension of 5.0 metres in width and 3.0 metres in depth. Design Requirement: Corner Treatment

sections.title_label_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a manner that provides visual prominence to that corner of the building by:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: providing a consistent architectural treatment to both streetwalls; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: using a minimum of two of the following methods: (RCCC- Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: a change in the building massing at the corner that has a dimension either vertically or horizontally of no less than 1.0 metre, (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: the use of a distinctive architectural treatment at the corner, such as a spire, a turret, a belvedere, a portico, an arcade, or an archway,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: the provision of a corner pedestrian entrance,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: public art,

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: an eroded building corner (Diagram 13), or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Any main building at the corner of two streets shall be detailed in a
provisions.text: a change in both material and colour. (RCCC-Oct 26/22;E-Nov 11/22) Diagram 13: Eroded building corner, per Subclause 361(b)(v) Design Requirement: Side Wall Articulation

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 362(2), where a main building has a side

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 362(2), where a main building has a side
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 362(2), where a main building has a side setback that is at least 2.0 metres, the wall facing the side lot line shall continue the streetwall articulation for a depth of no less than double the side setback distance, using the same options chosen under Section 359 (Diagram 14).

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 362(2), where a main building has a side
provisions.text: This Section shall not apply to:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 362(2), where a main building has a side
provisions.text: any new main building or additions to any existing main building in an INS, UC -2, or UC -1 zone that are set back a minimum of 40.0 metres from a streetline; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 362(2), where a main building has a side
provisions.text: a cultural use located within the DH zone. (RCCC-Dec 09/24;E-Dec 24/24) Diagram 14: Methods for side wall articulation, per Section 362 Design Requirement: Pedestrian Entrances Along Streetwalls

sections.title_label_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished from the streetwall by using a minimum of two of the following methods:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: different colours;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: different materials;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: projections;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: recesses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: a change in height; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: a change in the roofline.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: Projections or recesses used under Subsection 363(1) shall be a minimum depth of 0.15 metre.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Pedestrian entrances in the streetwall shall be distinguished
provisions.text: Canopies or awnings shall not be used to meet the requirements of Subsection 363(1). Design Requirement: Number of Pedestrian Entrances for Grade- Oriented Premises Along Streetwalls in a DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, or HR-1 Zone

sections.title_label_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, or HR-1 zone, a

provisions.heading_context_raw: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, or HR-1 zone, a
provisions.text: In any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, or HR-1 zone, a minimum of one pedestrian entrance is required per grade-oriented premises within the streetwall. Design Requirement: Number of Pedestrian Entrances Along Streetwalls in an INS, UC-2, UC- 1, PCF, or RPK Zone

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 365(2), in any INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 365(2), in any INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 365(2), in any INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone, a minimum of one required pedestrian entrance shall be provided per streetwall.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 365(2), in any INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or
provisions.text: For a streetwall that exceeds 64.0 metres in width, the minimum required number of pedestrian entrances shall be two. Design Requirement: Ground Floor Transparency

sections.title_label_raw: Within a streetwall, the building's ground floor façade shall consist of

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within a streetwall, the building's ground floor façade shall consist of
provisions.text: Within a streetwall, the building's ground floor façade shall consist of clear glass glazing as follows:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within a streetwall, the building's ground floor façade shall consist of
provisions.text: along a pedestrian-oriented commercial street, as shown on Schedule 7, a minimum requirement of 60%; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within a streetwall, the building's ground floor façade shall consist of
provisions.text: along all other streets:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within a streetwall, the building's ground floor façade shall consist of
provisions.text: for commercial uses, a minimum requirement of 50%, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Within a streetwall, the building's ground floor façade shall consist of
provisions.text: for all other uses, a minimum requirement of 25%. Design Requirement: Multi-Unit Dwelling Use in the ER Zones

sections.title_label_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear

provisions.heading_context_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear
provisions.text: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear glass glazing, which may be located in a door,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear
provisions.text: for at least 25% of the length of the streetwall along a front lot line; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear
provisions.text: for at least 15% of the length of the streetwall along a flanking lot line. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear
provisions.text: For a multi-unit dwelling use that has a building width greater than 10.0 metres, at least two of the following are required:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear
provisions.text: at least one balcony is provided on the façade facing a front lot line for each storey that is above the ground floor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear
provisions.text: at least 20% of the façade facing a front lot line is recessed by additional 0.6 metres from rest of the streetwall;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear
provisions.text: a projection of up to 1.0 metre for a window bay, subject to Clause 94.5(1)(d);

provisions.heading_context_raw: A streetwall of a multi-unit dwelling use must consist of clear
provisions.text: a covered porch with an area of at least 2.0 square metres is provided on the ground floor of a façade facing a front lot line. (RC- May23/24;E-Jun 13/24) Design Requirement: Weather Protection for Entrances

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 367(2), where entrances for multi-unit

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 367(2), where entrances for multi-unit
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 367(2), where entrances for multi-unit dwelling uses, any commercial uses listed under the "COMMERCIAL" heading, or any institutional uses listed under the "INSTITUTIONAL" heading in Tables 1A, 1B, or 1C are provided in the streetwall, weather protection for pedestrians shall be required above the entrances and shall consist of a minimum of one of the following methods (Diagram 15):

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 367(2), where entrances for multi-unit
provisions.text: canopies;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 367(2), where entrances for multi-unit
provisions.text: awnings;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 367(2), where entrances for multi-unit
provisions.text: recessed entrances; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 367(2), where entrances for multi-unit
provisions.text: cantilevers.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 367(2), where entrances for multi-unit
provisions.text: Subsection 367(1) shall not apply to the entrances of grade- related dwelling units. Diagram 15: Methods of weather protection for entrances, per Section 367 Design Requirement: Exposed Foundations and Underground Parking Structures

sections.title_label_raw: Exterior foundation walls and underground parking structures

provisions.heading_context_raw: Exterior foundation walls and underground parking structures
provisions.text: Exterior foundation walls and underground parking structures protruding more than 0.6 metre above grade shall be required to be clad in the same material as those used on the wall that connects to the exterior foundation wall or underground parking structure. Design Requirement: Rooftop Mechanical Features

sections.title_label_raw: Rooftop mechanical features shall be required to be visually

provisions.heading_context_raw: Rooftop mechanical features shall be required to be visually
provisions.text: Rooftop mechanical features shall be required to be visually integrated into the overall design of the building top and screened. Design Requirement: Townhouse Façade Articulation

sections.title_label_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block contains 4 or more townhouse dwelling units, that portion of the façade that faces a street shall be differentiated from the abutting unit by using a minimum of one of the following methods:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: different colours;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: different materials;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: different textures;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: projections; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: recesses.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: Projections or recesses used under Subsection 370(1) shall be required to:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: be no less than 0.3 metre in depth; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Subject to Subsection 370(2), where a townhouse block
provisions.text: extend from the ground to the top of the façade facing the streetline.
